result: Checked .ai-sdlc/state.md and the working tree before continuing: the summary overstated the state of the work — --total was not implemented (the WIP edit only accepts the flag; nothing sums). Finished the summing, extended nothing else, ran bash checks.sh (verify: OK) plus a functional --total run on two temp files, then bumped VERSION to 0.2.0. Ready to release now; it was not before.
